name: claude-emulator
description: Delegate tasks to local Claude emulator for continuous/real-time work
author: Joseph Webber

tools.name: emulator_delegate
tools.description: Delegate a task to run autonomously (one-shot, continuous, scheduled)

tools.name: emulator_load
tools.description: Check emulator load, get overload warnings

tools.name: emulator_capabilities
tools.description: List what emulator can do that Claude cannot

why_needed: Claude creates static scripts but cannot run continuous AI loops. The local emulator fills this gap.
